issues.detail: Instructions do not cover error scenarios or edge cases.
Skill is specific to Express/Node.js and not platform-agnostic.

scenarios.name: Express app with email/password and Google login
scenarios.rationale: Treatment wires passport-local with bcrypt.compare plus passport-google-oauth20 with callbackURL and routes using passport.authenticate with successRedirect/failureRedirect, including serializeUser/deserializeUser; baseline covers local strategy adequately but skips serialize/deserialize wiring.

scenarios.name: Harden a Passport session-auth app for production
scenarios.rationale: Treatment specifies bcrypt cost 12+, express-session with Redis store, CSRF protection for session auth, and OAuth account linking; baseline gives broader best practices but omits the Redis session store and account linking guidance.
